constraint.description: The groupId for jQAssistant plugin Maven projects must follow the pattern 'org.jqassistant.plugin.<project>'.

concept.description: Labels all Maven projects which declare "org.jqassistant.plugin:parent" as parent module with "Parent".

constraint.description: All Maven projects must define the same groupId as the parent of the plugin project.
At least one developer must be specified in the "developers" section of the parent pom.xml of a plugin project.
A SCM section having both connection and developerConnection set to "scm:git:https://github.com/jqassistant-plugin/_repository-name_" must be specified in the parent pom.xml of a plugin project.
The project URL must be defined in the parent pom.xml of a plugin project.

concept.description: Finds all test methods (i.e. annotated with "@org.junit.jupiter.api.ParameterizedTest") and labels them with "Test", "Parameterized", and "Junit5".
Finds all test methods (i.e. annotated with "@org.junit.jupiter.api.Test") and labels them with "Test" and "Junit5".
Labels all methods annotated by "@org.junit.jupiter.api.TestTemplate" with "Junit5", "Test" and "Template".
Finds all test methods (i.e. annotated with "@org.junit.jupiter.api.RepeatedTest") and labels them with "Test", "Repeated", and "Junit5".
Labels all classes containing test methods with "Test" and "Junit5".

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void avoidInitializingBean(), void avoidDisposableBean(), void avoidBeanFactoryAware(), void avoidApplicationContextAware(), void avoidApplicationEventPublisherAwareBean()

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void injectableCreatesInstance(), void nonInjectableCreatesInstance(), void testClasses(), void configInstantiatesSubClassOfInjectable()

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void serviceWithFieldInjection(), void serviceWithConstructorInjection(), void rejectsNonFinalInjectableField(), void doesNotRejectFinalInjectableField()

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void transactionMethodsMustNotBeCalledDirectlyWithViolations(java.lang.Class), void transactionMethodsMustNotBeCalledDirectlyWithViolationsInSubClass(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromSameClassSimpleInheritance(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromSameClassGenericInheritance(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromNestedClass(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromNestedClassInSubClass(), void nonTransactionalMethodCallingTransactionalMethod(java.lang.Class)

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void constructorFieldsMustNotBeManipulated(), void configurationProperties(), void syntheticFields()

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void beanProducerInConfigurationComponent(), void beanProducerInServiceComponent(), void beanProducerMustNotBeInvokedDirectly()

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void validControllerDependencies(), void invalidControllerDependencies(), void validServiceDependencies(), void invalidServiceDependencies(), void validRepositoryDependencies(), void invalidRepositoryDependencies()

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void beanMethod(java.lang.Class,java.lang.Class), void injectionPoint(), void injectable(), void constraintValidator(java.lang.Class,java.lang.Class)

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void endpoint(), void mockWebServiceServerVerifyMethod(), void providedConceptAssertMethod()

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void configuration(), void controller(), void service(), void repository(), void directComponentDependencies(), void component()

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void restController(), void controllerAdvice(), void restControllerAdvice()

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void feignClient(), void feignClientProvidesInjectable(), void feignClientConfiguration(), void feignClientConfigurationProvidesInjectable(), void feignClientConfigurationProvidesConfiguration(), void feignClientConfigurationProvidesComponent()

concept.description: Adds a label "IntegrationTest" to all non-abstract classes deriving from AbstractPluginIT or AbstractJavaPluginIT.

constraint.description: All integration test classes must have the name suffix "IT" for being executed using the Maven Failsafe Plugin.

concept.description: Labels all types annotated with "@org.neo4j.procedure.Procedure" with `Neo4j` and `Procedure`.
Labels jQAssistant plugin descriptor files with `jQAssistant` and `PluginDescriptor`.
Creates a `REGISTERS` relation between all procedure class elements of the jQAssistant plugin descriptor to the matching Java type.

constraint.description: Types declaring Neo4j procedures must be registered.

concept.description: Labels all types annotated with "@org.neo4j.procedure.UserFunction" with `Neo4j` and `UserFunction`.
Creates a `REGISTERS` relation between all function class elements of the jQAssistant plugin descriptor to the matching Java type.

constraint.description: Types declaring Neo4j user functions must be registered.
The jQAssistant XML Plugin descriptor ("/META-INF/jqassistant-plugin.xml") should provide a "version" attribute for its root element.

concept.description: Labels types generated by Lombok as 'Generated' (requires 'lombok.addLombokGeneratedAnnotation=true' in 'lombok.config').
Reports the count of types labeled with `Generated`, grouped by containing artifact.

constraint.description: All package names used in a Maven project must start with the groupId.
